name: Corn Cakes-Essence of Emeril TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine sour cream, chives, and white wine. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, whisk together all ingredients except oil and garnishes.
3. Heat a griddle or nonstick pan and brush with about 1 teaspoon of vegetable oil.
4. Spoon tablespoonfuls of batter onto the griddle and cook until they form a golden crust. Turn once during cooking.
5. Remove from the heat and keep warm while using up the remaining batter. Serve 3 cakes per person with a spoonful of chive cream and a dollop of caviar.
6. Sprinkle with your choice of traditional garnishes.
